headline: Now Corporation (PSE:NOW) Approves Board Changes, New Risk Chief, And Office Move
summary: Now Corporation (PSE:NOW) approved board-level leadership changes at a recent meeting. Directors confirmed new committee appointments and elected a new Chief Risk Officer. The board also approved the relocation of the company’s principal office. PSE:NOW is trading at ₱0.59, with the stock up 49.4% over the past year, down 15.7% year to date, and down 6.3% over the past 30 days. These mixed returns provide context for shareholders assessing how Now Corporation is organizing itself at the...
